title: Avoid using Guava APIs in Java 8 or higher
description: This rule raises an issue when the following Guava APIs are used: com.google.common.io.BaseEncoding#base64(), com.google.common.io.BaseEncoding#base64Url(). It is recommended to prefer Java 8 or higher APIs over Guava ones to ease maintenance.
recommendation: Prefer Java 8 or higher APIs over Guava ones

checks.message: Prefer Java 8 or higher APIs over Guava ones
